note: V11 banner FIX — replaced 'iff' (mathematical 'if and only if') with plain 'if' in the lottery exclusion rule. The 'single rule' wording in the bold prefix already conveys the only-if direction, so the verbose 'iff' was both confusing and looked like a typo. ALSO restored the shared HIDE NAV / SHOW NAV button on the explorer page: js/nav-toggle.js was missing from sost-explorer.html (45 of 47 section pages had it; the explorer was one of the 2 that didn't), which is why the toggle did not appear on the live site. Added the script include before </head>; the auto-injector picks up the existing nav element and exposes the same pulsing red/gold button used on every other section. No banner content changes beyond iff -> if. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
